items.title: Lynx's Collier (ankle) sidelined until at least June
items.dek: Napheesa Collier won't be back on the court for the Lynx until at least June as she recovers from March ankle surgery.
items.body: Napheesa Collier won't be back on the court for the Lynx until at least June as she recovers from March ankle surgery.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mass trial for 486 alleged gang members begins in El Salvador
items.dek: Footage released by the attorney general's office shows large groups of men in prison attending the trial via video link.
items.body: Footage released by the attorney general's office shows large groups of men in prison attending the trial via video link.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sanders touts 'new vibe' under Browns' Monken
items.dek: Shedeur Sanders said there is a "new vibe" and "new energy" with the Browns under first-year coach Todd Monken and his staff.
items.body: Shedeur Sanders said there is a "new vibe" and "new energy" with the Browns under first-year coach Todd Monken and his staff.
items.author: IriLine Desk
